description:
ICICI Lombard Elevate Health Insurance-Every Detail You Need To Know #healthinsurance #icicilombard

#insuranceimpact #insurance #harvindersingh #insuranceagency #insuranceagent #insuranceagents #mediclaim #elevate #icicilombard

Icici Lombard has launched it's latest Health Insurance Plan Named "Elevate".
Insurance Company claims it a revolutionary health Insurance plan.

So In Today's Video we will discuss:

How is ICICI Lombard Elevate Health Insurance Plan different from other Health Insurance Plans?
What is eligibility conditions to Buy ICICI Lombard Elevate Plan?
What are different INfinite Coverages in Icici Lombard Elevate Health Insurance Policy?
How you can choose unlimited sum insured in Icici lombard elevate health plan?
what are different addons in Icici elevate health plan?
Is maternity covered in icici lombard elevate health insurance plan?
What are the waiting period in icici lombard elevate health policy for different treatments?
How much you have to pay to buy Icici Lombard elevate plan?
Is Icici Lombard really a revolutionary product or just a hype ?

this video is going to be detailed review of Icici lombard elevate health insurance plan in hindi.
so don't miss the video...

आप हमारे वीडियो को पसंद करते हैं, तो आप हमें सब्सक्राइब कर सकते हैं:

by jump start , waiting period of only  these pre existing medical conditions - will be reduced to 30 days 1. Asthma
2. Diabetes
3. Hypertension
4. Hyperlipidemia
5. Obesity 
6. Coronary Artery Disease (PTCA done prior to 1 year) ; depending on the medical status , extra loading may be applied by insurer ;  we shall suggest you the suitable plans according to your requirements, and guide you to buy the suitable policies ! comments.text: ​ @rishabh4721 In the essential package these are compulsory to take but in basic pack you can opt addons of your choice.
comments.author: @insuranceimpact

comments.text: @insuranceimpact  thanks! What's the difference between basic and essential pack (except mandatory add-ons)?
comments.author: @rishabh4721

comments.text:
Nothing else. Essential pack is auto loaded with essential addons. 
Basic package is the base plan.

So that one can decide between the two quickly without getting confused.
comments.author: @insuranceimpact

comments.text:
In ICICI Elevate plan, 
1. Did unlimited restoration of SI activate only after after complete exhaustion of SI or both for Complete and partial exhaustion of SI? (Not clearly mentioned in policy wordings) 
2. For road ambulance, why is it mentioned "transfer the Insured Person to the nearest Hospital"? will they not pay ambulance charges if a person admitted in a hospital which not nearest to him? 
3. Please explain the following point mention in Claim Protector add-on: "Any Sum Insured accrued under Guaranteed Cumulative Bonus/Inflation Protector/Reset benefit will not be available for Claim Protector Cover".
comments.author: @IndranilRoy-gy9xv

comments.text:
1. Not clearly mention but point 3 in reset benefit states that when "Annual sum Insured or any accrued sum insured is insufficient for the policyholder" means if partially utilized  and if needed Reset sum insured can be used.

2. Nearest Hospital is mentioned for emergency care , but you can shift patient for better treatment to other hospital too.

3.Policyholder can use only base sum insured for Non-medical items. If claim is paid using accrued sum insured other than Basic Sum Insured as mentioned, Consumables expenses are not payable.
